summary: 7 film announcements, 4 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Mandela Catalogue
film.announcement: Steven Spielberg, Scott Stuber's United Artists, and Amazon MGM Studios acquired the YouTube horror franchise for a big screen adaptation.

film.title: Best Men
film.announcement: Patty Jenkins is set to produce the rom-com about an unexpected wedding romance, adapted from a gay romance novel.

film.title: Moana 3
film.announcement: A third installment in the Moana franchise is in development at Disney, according to star Dwayne Johnson.

film.title: Ocean's Eleven Prequel
film.talent: Josh Gad, Margot Robbie, Bradley Cooper
film.announcement: Josh Gad boards the Ocean's Eleven prequel alongside Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper.

film.title: Les Misérables
film.talent: Vincent Lindon, Tahar Rahim, Fred Cavayé (director)
film.announcement: StudioCanal unveiled a teaser for Fred Cavayé's sweeping adaptation of Victor Hugo's classic novel starring Vincent Lindon and Tahar Rahim.

film.title: Kiki's Delivery Service
film.announcement: GKIDS acquired the Studio Ghibli library for the U.K. and Ireland, including an IMAX release of Kiki's Delivery Service.

film.title: The Dog Stars
film.announcement: Josh Brolin nearly quit Ridley Scott's film after the first day of filming, according to behind-the-scenes details.

tv.title: Toxic Moms
tv.talent: Ashley Tisdale, Sabrina Jalees, Ali Wong
tv.announcement: Ashley Tisdale is developing a comedy series at Netflix with Sabrina Jalees and Ali Wong following a viral essay.

tv.title: Sarek
tv.announcement: Prime Video Nordics is adapting Ulf Kvensler's debut novel Sarek as a psychological thriller series starring actors from Quicksand and Barracuda Queens.

tv.title: The Next Move
tv.announcement: Questlove is developing a digital talk show titled The Next Move in partnership with North Road.

tv.title: Ghostbusters Animated Series
tv.announcement: A Ghostbusters animated series is in development, eyeing its own Clone Wars-style expanded universe moment.
